1094099.SpecialWords:
In Asterleeds, a "Storm Year" occurs periodically, accompanied by a legend of a sea beast. Every year, rumors of sightings of this sea beast emerge, but no concrete evidence has been found so far.
Does it really exist in the vast ocean of Asterleeds?
